roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:DA MOVES TO ADMIT PAROLE VIOLATION REPORT AS EVIDENCE,THE PAROLEE, DERICK JAMAL, SUBMITS ON THE MOTION,THE COURT FINDS THAT DERICK JAMAL HAS VIOLATED THE GENERAL TERMS OF HIS PAROLE CONDITIONS,/3000REIN/PAJ:180 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  85  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 09-18-13,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:03-20-14 /X:COURT SIGNS ORDER RELEASING DERICK JAMAL ON 6-13-2014 TO THE AGENTS -STAFF OF THE DIVISIONOF ADULT PAROLE,AGENT STEPHEN VELEZ WILL PICK-UP DERICK JAMAL IN THE MORNING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 13, 2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/
